# SyllabusHQ
Free Sri Lankan G.C.E. Ordinary Level (O/L) exam practice in English medium.
Subjects: Mathematics, Science, Business & Accounting Studies.
Formats: original MCQs, structured past-paper-style questions, short-answer drills, Business case studies.
All content is original, written to match O/L syllabus and difficulty. Not affiliated with the Department of Examinations Sri Lanka.

Key pages:
- / — home with subject grid and study streak
- /structured — structured papers, short answer, case studies
- /reviews — student reviews
- /suggest — feature suggestions
